TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Gnaalu, title = Gnaalu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gnaalu} }

S.FORM: gnaalu Itiniay i Ji'an Cen no Hualien ko gnaalu a niyaro', 304 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 801 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 30% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 243 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 70% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 558 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis20%, Truku4%, Tayal3%, Bunun3%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *naaɾo~u~u itiniaj i *iʡan ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u *naaɾo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis**%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, tajaɾ*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: gnaalu Itiniay i Ji'an Cen no Hualien ko gnaalu a niyaro', 304 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 801 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 30% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 243 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 70% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 558 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis20%, Truku4%, Tayal3%, Bunun3%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *naaɾo~u~u itiniaj i *iʡan ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u *naaɾo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis**%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, tajaɾ*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
